```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 4 aims to ensure that undocumented adults in California have access to health care.",
    "AB 4 will remove immigration status as a barrier to adults accessing full scope Medi-Cal services.",
    "The lack of access to health care for undocumented individuals results in acute medical problems and ongoing health issues.",
    "In California, as of 2016, full-scope Medi-Cal coverage is provided to all children regardless of their immigration status.",
    "Approximately 3 million Californians do not have health insurance coverage, with about 58 percent of them being undocumented adults.",
    "Expanding Medi-Cal is expected to benefit individual Californians and bolster the health and financial vitality of their families and communities."
  ]
```
